_coverage_note: JNTUH (Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad -- Telangana's main affiliating university) Engineering colleges: 8 constituent (university-run) + 137 regular-affiliated (Autonomous-Private or Private), sourced from JNTUH's own official portals. Constituent colleges from jntuh.ac.in's official constituent-colleges page (Hyderabad/Kukatpally flagship, Jagtial, Manthani, Sultanpur, Rajanna Sircilla, Wanaparthy, Mahabubabad, Palair) -- excludes the 2 non-Engineering constituent colleges also listed there (University College of Pharmaceutical Sciences & Management Sultanpur; University College of Management Hyderabad). Affiliated colleges from jntuhaac.in's 'Colleges Granted Affiliation Academic Year wise' page for ACADEMIC YEAR 2025-26 (the current AY at the time of sourcing, selected via ?academicYearId=17) -- NOT the /Public/oldcolleges or /Public/CollegeNameAndAddress pages, which are stale/cumulative or explicitly dated AY 2019-20. Filtered to Engineering only (excludes Pharmacy and Management/PG colleges on the same list); autonomous status taken from the '(Autonomous)' annotation the portal itself attaches to college names. Ten ambiguous names (Group of Institutions / Technical Campus / PG & Research Academy phrasing that didn't match simple Engineering keywords) were resolved individually against each college's own website or a web search rather than guessed -- see each record's notes for colleges where this applied; two were excluded as umbrella entries that would have double-counted an Engineering college already captured under its own separately-coded entry elsewhere in the same list (Sree Dattha Group of Institutions, St. Mary's Group of Institutions Hyderabad). Deduped within JNTUH by name+district (not by code, which the portal reuses, and not by name alone, since some genuinely different JNTUH colleges share a near-identical name in different districts). The resulting Engineering-only count (137 affiliated) matches JNTUH's own current-homepage-cited figure of 137 Engineering colleges, and the excluded Management/PG count (6) matches its cited 6 standalone MCA/MBA colleges -- both used as an external cross-check on the classification, not as a source in themselves. Districts and college names are exactly as given by the source portals (Telangana district reorganization names, e.g. Ranga Reddy, Medchal, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri). branches_offered and per-college city are not yet sourced per-college.

colleges.name: JNTUH University College of Engineering, Science & Technology, Hyderabad
colleges.notes: JNTUH constituent (university-run) engineering college, confirmed from JNTUH's own official constituent-colleges page. The flagship/main campus at Kukatpally; JNTUH's own site footer gives its address as 'Kukatpally, Hyderabad', so Hyderabad is used as the district. No dedicated college subdomain was found reachable, so the main university site is used as the official_website. branches_offered not yet sourced per-college.
